'''dhazïfdhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnitis|arachnitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnitis|arachnitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhazïfdhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhæzïfdhïfth || dhæzïfdhïfj || dhæzïfdhïfsh || dhæzïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhazïfzïfdhïfth || dhazïfzïfdhïfj || dhazïfzïfdhïfsh || dhazïfzïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhazïfdhïfth || dhazïfdhïfj || dhazïfdhïfsh || dhazïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhazïffdhïffth || dhazïffdhïffj || dhazïffdhïffsh || dhazïffdhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhazïfdhïfïf || dhazïfdhïfïf || dhazïfdhïfïf || dhazïfdhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhazïfdhïfth || dhazïfdhïfj || dhazïfdhïfsh || dhazïfdhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhazïfdhïfïfl || dhazïfdhïfïfl || dhazïfdhïfïfl || dhazïfdhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhazïfdhïfïfïf || dhazïfdhïfïfïf || dhazïfdhïfïfïf || dhazïfdhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhazïfdhïfïfn || dhazïfdhïfïfn || dhazïfdhïfïfn || dhazïfdhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhazïfdhïfïforo || dhazïfdhïfïforo || dhazïfdhïfïforo || dhazïfdhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
